feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Balanced Breakfast
entry.summary:
Author: unreckless

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,442Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: It had been two weeks since they had done more than sleepily peck each other’s lips across a shared pillow before passing out curled together like quotation marks. “I’m too tired to even grope you,” Buck lamented over coffee the next morning, dawn barely a rumor in the window above the sink. They’d woken tangled together in Eddie’s bed, fumbled through possibly the least romantic shared shower they’d ever had including the half-injured ones before they got together, and dressed.“It’s serious, then,” Eddie replied dryly.“You haven’t groped me, either,” Buck said. It was, sadly, a winning argument. Eddie conceded the point immediately.-or: before their last shift before they move in together, eddie successfully rage-baits his boyfriend into a morning quickie

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Buck-et list
entry.summary:
Author: goldenbuck118

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,151Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: After a close call on a rescue, Buck realizes there are too many things he's been putting off for someday. So he makes a list. Some items are easy: Learn more of Bobby's recipes. Take Theo camping. Learn to surf. See the Northern Lights. Some are harder: Go to therapy. Tell people he loves them. Figure out what Eddie means to him. One checked box at a time, Buck begins rebuilding a life shaped by grief, healing, family, and the terrifying realization that the thing he's been looking for might have been standing beside him all along. Or: Buck makes a bucket list, Theo adopts it as a personal project, the 118 become emotionally invested against their will, and Eddie Diaz ends up being both the problem and the solution.

entry.title: minestra maritata
entry.summary:
Author: damnit_aoidee

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,605Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: “It’s a mistranslation… sort of–” Buck waggled his head, “It’s– It means the flavours. The flavours mix while it stews, it’s why it's so rich. Chicken broth, pork meatballs, the veggies all mixed up together. The flavours compliment each other, it marries up while it cooks so…” “So… wedding soup,” Eddie finished with a chuckle. Buck laughed, and repeated, “Wedding soup.” or, Buck and Eddie make family dinner and Eddie takes a leap

entry.title: I got tired of being strong
entry.summary:
Author: LovemeanywayBandE

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 61,750Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 101

Summary: So he had won, he returned, he smiled and joked and was sunshine and silliness, he was the person everyone needed him to be and it changed depending on who it was. He didn’t share the truth about how he was struggling with more than just the emotional toll of the last few months because that would strain the relationships he worked so hard to get back. The thing that kept him awake at night alongside all his other worries was the realisation that this family that he held so dear that he had wanted so badly, no longer felt a permanent part of his life, He didn’t trust it anymore But no matter how many times he told himself he was happy and it was all ok, he couldn’t ignore the black pit inside of him that he was slowly drowning in that whispered you are not wanted, no one really cares, you are unlovable, you are exhausting. Post law suit everything is getting back to normal .everyone has forgiven Buck and he is back where he belongs. So why does he feel so broken?

entry.title: Oh, My Little Soldier Boy
entry.summary:
Author: Sunnypfeil

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,465Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: The fourth of July. The great American holiday of independence. A day where people come together with their families and celebrate, filled with pride, and joy. For most people it was a good day. Except for Eddie, for Eddie it has always been a day filled with possible triggers, and panic. Or: Eddie's triggered by the fireworks, and gets forced to relieve his worst trauma. Buck is there to help him through it.

entry.title: I will always protect you
entry.summary:
Author: LovemeanywayBandE

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,381Chapters: 6/6Kudos: 108

Summary: Eddie's head snapped up. One of the SWAT officers was pointing at a portable monitor set up near the command vehicle—a live feed from the news broadcast still streaming from inside the school. The camera was shaky, the angle awkward, but it showed a hallway. And there—*there*—was Buck. Eddie's breath caught in his throat. Buck was in the middle of the corridor, and he was fighting. Not running, not hiding—*fighting*. Hand-to-hand combat with one of the shooters, brutal and desperate. Buck's face was streaked with blood, his shirt torn, but he was moving with the fierce determination of someone protecting something precious. The camera zoomed in slightly, and Eddie could see it now—the way Buck had positioned himself. The storage closet door visible behind him. The way every move Buck made was calculated to keep the shooter away from that door, to use his body as a barrier. "The boys," Eddie said, his voice hollow with realisation. "They're in that closet. That's where he hid them. He's—" Eddie's voice broke. "He's protecting them." Or Buck is taking the boys to Christopher’s science Fayre when a school shooting starts. We see how Buck fights to keep his boys safe and how Eddie rushes to save them

entry.title: Ice bound
entry.summary:
Author: LovemeanywayBandE

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 32,978Chapters: 12/12Kudos: 16

Summary: The first time Eddie saw himself on a sports blog, it wasn't about his stats. The headline read: *"Teen Hockey Phenoms: The Diaz-Buckley Dynamic That's Breaking the Internet."* Below it was a gif of Buck slamming into the boards to defend Eddie from a brutal check, followed immediately by Eddie retaliating with a hit so fierce the other player went down hard. The caption: *"Tell me these two aren't completely feral for each other."* "Have you seen this?" Buck asked, appearing at Eddie's shoulder in the common room, phone already out. The comments were... a lot. *"The way Diaz looks at Buckley though 👀"* *"I'm not saying they're in love but I'm also not NOT saying it"* *"These two have more chemistry than my parents' entire marriage"* Buck was laughing, but Eddie noticed the way his ears had gone pink. "People are wild, man." "Yeah," Eddie said, throat dry. "Wild."

entry.title: For The Rest of Our Lives, Baby
entry.summary:
Author: j_marie_archie50

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,780Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 31

Summary: “Aren’t you just so lucky to have a boyfriend that makes breakfast for you every morning?” Buck teased, smirking at Eddie. “Won’t have a boyfriend for much longer,” Eddie replied. He dropped another kiss on Buck’s cheek before backing away. “See you tonight, have a good day!” And then he was gone. Buck stood frozen in the middle of the kitchen, his hand still hovering mid-air where he’d had it extended towards Eddie. The rest of the room continued to exist–the fridge still hummed, the clock still ticked on the wall, the coffee pot still hissed–but Buck couldn’t really hear anything over the blood roaring in his ears. What did Eddie say?   OR: Buck spends the entire day thinking Eddie is going to break up with him. Eddie asks Buck to marry him instead

entry.summary:
Author: Kxk

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,532Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 11

Summary: Buddie Bingo finally comes to an end, the person who won? None other then Buck himself. Who had no idea about the bet? "What, who won?" Buck tried to look at their phones.  "You did."  "So you guys are on LSD, okay let's call Athena. Probably should get the chief too."  "I'll contact cedars sinai. It'll be a priority call."

entry.summary:
Author: Midnight_Archive

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 971Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 3

Summary: “Guys trust me I’m okay” He says smiling at all of them, trying so hard to make them believe. A knock on the head at a routine call causes Buck to worry about his position at the 118 and lie about how he really is, but Eddie knows him too well to believe the bluff. Can he get Buck to admit it before it’s too late.

entry.title: Diaz’s Anatomy
entry.summary:
Author: danibuckleydiaz

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,071Chapters: 3/12Kudos: 20

Summary: Eddie Diaz is someone who has always tried his hardest at everything. Make no mistake, his father said. Becoming a Surgeon was what Eddie knew he was destined to do. But what he didn’t know was, that he was going to fall in love in the process. Evan Buckley thought that there was no hope for him. He knew what was going to happen to him. It was hard these days to keep the faith. But, maybe sometimes faith came in different forms. Maybe even a person. OR, Eddie Diaz tries his hardest to heal Evan Buckley.

entry.title: Operation: Ultimate Cookie
entry.summary:
Author: Ramsey_Writes

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,456Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 23

Summary: Buck grinned. "We've got this under control, Maddie. Don't we, Jee?" He winked at her, who was busy poking his nose. "Operation: Ultimate Cookie is already in the briefing stage." "Briefing stage?" Eddie asked, walking into the kitchen and adjusting the strap of his gym bag. His eyes swept over the counter and the supplies Buck had laid out: three different kinds of chocolate—milk, dark, and butterscotch chips—two kinds of sugar, enough butter to clog a drain, and a plethora of cookie cutters. OR Buck does one of his favorite things—baking—with his favorite kids.

entry.title: There's No You Without Me
entry.summary:
Author: 79KJ01

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 58,693Chapters: 20/30Kudos: 50

Summary: “Where are you driving from?” Eddie asked, his mouth moving before he could stop it, his brain deciding that awkward small talk was infinitely safer than just standing there vibrating with nervous energy. “East,” the guy replied with a casual, fluid roll of his broad shoulders. “Farther than I wanted to be, honestly. And definitely longer than I originally planned.” Before the army, before Los Angeles, and long before the 118, there was a dusty gas station on the edge of El Paso, a broken-down Jeep with Pennsylvania plates, and a stranger named Evan. For years, they were each other's entire world, surviving basic training, AIT, and a grueling deployment side-by-side. But a devastating wave of silence and a massive misunderstanding tore them apart, leaving behind a deep, soul-cutting ache and a history neither of them ever truly moved on from. Now, the past has finally caught up to the present. Standing under the harsh fluorescent lights of Station 118, Eddie and Evan are forced to navigate the wreckage of the life they left behind—and the terrifying truth of everything they never stopped running from.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: hot stud shows you how he loves it touched
entry.summary:
Author: Llexeh

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,863Chapters: 1/5Kudos: 22

Summary: “Are you -“ “Am I teasing my dick with my palm while thinking about your thighs and how they’d feel around my head? You bet,” Eddie chuckles. This time, Buck’s moan is loud and unabashed. “Whatever you want, Eds. Anything you want.” “God, Buck, I want to touch you everywhere. I want to spread you over my lap, face up so I can see your eyes. You’re so stupidly pretty.” Buck gasps, then there’s some rustling, then the sound gets clearer; Buck’s put airpods in too, also slow on the uptake. “Are you hard because of me?” There’s some smugness in his voice, Eddie knows all of Buck’s voices by heart, but also a needy breathlessness. Eddie snorts, frankly inelegant and borderline funny. “Baby, I’ve not stopped being hard since I clicked the link.”Or: Eddie Diaz, newly-minted queer (label pending), has a free afternoon and sits down to jerk off with a bit of porn. He can't quite believe the man in the video is Buck, but the evidence is right there and the result is incredibly hot. He obviously calls Buck about it. They obviously end up fucking for 24 hours; they have all that time to make up for, after all.

entry.title: Forgetting something?
entry.summary:
Author: Fictionfan321

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,634Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 243

Summary: Buck has a feeling he's forgetting something. He just can't put his finger on what. Until he receives an angry phone call Also don't hate me for this but chris is younger then in canon. Theo is 4 and chris is 9. I wanted them a bit closer in age and young enough to ask what certain words mean that older kids will understand. It might make sense in this story.

entry.title: The Family We Chose
entry.summary:
Author: Pnk_strawberry1

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 91,901Chapters: 18/18Kudos: 423

Summary: Evan Buckley was truly fucked. One week after leaving the only home he’d ever known, his parents’ house—Ground Zero hit, and the world went to hell. Eight months later, he’s still searching for his sister Maddie in Los Angeles, armed only with a tear-stained note: “I’m leaving Doug. I’m going to Los Angeles.” When Buck finally tracks her to Safe Zone 118, he realizes that maybe having a family and surviving alongside people who actually care, isn’t so bad. At 118, firefighter Eddie Diaz, a single dad, turned his fire station into a refuge with his team when Ground Zero struck. Just trying to keep his kids safe, he’s thrown for a loop when a stranger shows up claiming to be Maddie’s brother. Buck is skilled, prepared, and oddly magnetic, forcing Eddie to question everything he thought he knew about survival, trust, and maybe even… something more.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
